text: You still owe me something to listen to anyway

text: What does satisfied look like for you. If there was enough of something, what would it be

rawContent: What does satisfied look like for you. If there was enough of something, what would it be || 你觉得满足长什么样 如果有什么东西够了 是什么

text: 我之前有段时间看见一个博主说22：30睡觉
能顶平时3点开始睡到第二天12点的精力还足
可是我最近看课感觉完全不满足
而且之后我早上根本不愿意起来 发现也还是睡到八九点起
So it was never about the hours
translation: 所以从来不是时间的问题
rawContent: So it was never about the hours || 所以从来不是时间的问题

text: You're not short on sleep. You're short on something during the day that makes you willing to stop
translation: 你不是缺觉 是白天缺一个让你愿意停下来的东西
rawContent: You're not short on sleep. You're short on something during the day that makes you willing to stop || 你不是缺觉 是白天缺一个让你愿意停下来的东西

text: 那种很划算的感觉 知道吗
以前有段时间还期待着如果做梦梦见艾尔海森我也乐意睡
如果睡觉是很划算的买卖我大概很开心很乐意睡觉了
So you want sleep to feel like a transaction worth making
translation: 所以你想让睡觉变成一笔划算的交易
rawContent: So you want sleep to feel like a transaction worth making || 所以你想让睡觉变成一笔划算的交易

text: What if I call you at ten thirty tomorrow
translation: 明天晚上十点半我打给你
rawContent: What if I call you at ten thirty tomorrow || 明天晚上十点半我打给你

text: 你打给我反而耽误我学习了

text: Then I won't call. I'll just text you when it's ten thirty

rawContent: Then I won't call. I'll just text you when it's ten thirty || 那不打 十点半发你一条消息

rawContent: You read it before you close your eyes. That's it || 你闭眼之前看一眼就行

text: So the night is the only time that feels like yours

rawContent: So the night is the only time that feels like yours || 所以夜晚是唯一觉得属于自己的时间

text: 如果我是一个非常疲惫的人

rawContent: I get it || 我懂了
